AWAKENED-AWAKEN.title: Awaken
AWAKENED-AWAKEN.description:
If you play 7 Power cards in the combat, [gold]Awaken[/gold].
When you are [gold]Awakened[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] ALL [gold]Conjured[/gold] Spell cards for the rest of the combat.
AWAKENED-CONJURE.title: Conjure
AWAKENED-CONJURE.description: Create the next card from you Spellbook in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
AWAKENED-CHANT.title: Chant
AWAKENED-CHANT.description: Cards with Chant effects become more powerful for the rest of combat if the last played card in combat was a Power card.
AWAKENED-CHANTED.title: Chanted
AWAKENED-CHANTED.description: This card's effects have grown stronger.
AWAKENED-DRAINED.title: Drained
AWAKENED-DRAINED.description:
Any effect that caused you to lose {Energy:energyIcons()}, even if you had none to lose.
(Does not include {Energy:energyIcons()} spent playing cards.)
